CustomField.description: Contractual minimum monthly Agentic Work Units (AWU) the customer commits to. This commit unlocks the lower Per-AWU Rate. Core field of the Committed-Spend Opportunity.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Mínimo mensual de AWU que el cliente se compromete a consumir. Este compromiso contractual habilita la tarifa Per-AWU reducida.
CustomField.label: AWU Monthly Commit
